summary: A recorded segment from Fox News' 'The Ingraham Angle' with host Laura Ingraham in studio over chyrons reading 'MORE ILLEGALS THROWN OUT OF BOSTON' and 'TRUMP ADMIN CLEANS UP SANCTUARY CITIES.' It shows ICE Boston B-roll of an arrest, agents in tactical gear, a clip of Mayor Michelle Wu, and a graphic listing arrested aliens' charges. This is a straight cable-news talk segment, not a music-driven or genre-styled production, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: MORE ILLEGALS THROWN OUT OF BOSTON
TRUMP ADMIN CLEANS UP SANCTUARY CITIES
